---
title: "remove_pr_website"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{remove_pr_website}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# remove_pr_website Workflow

This reusable workflow deletes the documentation website for a pull request when
the pull request is closed. It is designed to be used in conjunction with the
[`pkgdown`](pkgdown.html) workflow, which may generate and deploy documentation
to a subfolder of the `gh-pages` branch.
